allow: Bash(python -c "from pptx import Presentation; prs = Presentation\('src/reports/Bi weekly April WEBSITE UPDATES.pptx'\); print\(f'Total slides: {len\(prs.slides\)}'\); [print\(f'Slide {i+1} shapes: ' + str\([\(s.name, s.text_frame.text[:60] if s.has_text_frame else '[img]'\) for s in slide.shapes][:4]\)\) for i, slide in enumerate\(prs.slides\)]")
